headline: Why Is NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of chip manufacturer NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ: NXPI) jumped 5.5% in the afternoon session after hedge funds increased their exposure to the stock, signaling a significant improvement in investor sentiment.

headline: Stocks Rally as President Trump Signs a Preliminary Deal to End the US-Iran War
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.73%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.53%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +1.62%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +0.80%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: Can onsemi's Treo Platform Unlock New Automotive Opportunities?
summary: ON's Treo platform is gaining traction in software-defined vehicles, with rapid adoption, new auto wins and margin-rich growth potential.
